# Weekly Investment Recommendations
**Week 22, 2026** (2026-05-25 – 2026-05-29)

> Strategy: Swedish small/midcap stocks · 13,000 SEK bankroll · 1–2% risk per trade · Manual execution

> **Regenerated 2026-05-29** (original report date 2026-05-27)

## Portfolio Overview

| | |
|---|---|
| Total capital | **13,000 SEK** |
| Cash | 284 SEK (2%) |
| Initial bankroll | **13,126 SEK** |
| Invested | 12,842 SEK (99%) |
| Drawdown from peak | none |
| Risk mode | Normal (full size) |
| IBKR account | `U25301301` |

## Portfolio Risk Summary

| | |
|---|---|
| Portfolio heat | **4.9%** of capital at open risk (limit: 8.0%) |
| Cash available | 284 SEK (2% of capital) |
| Sector exposure | Healthcare 31%, Industrials 40%, Utilities 26% |
| Cycle driver exposure | industrial_capex 40% |

## Backtest Scorecard (52-week rolling window)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Hit rate | 0.0% ↓ -11.11% |
| Avg return/position | -3.21% ↓ -3.29% |
| Max drawdown | -2.09% ↑ -0.52% |
| Sharpe ratio (annualized) | 0.055 ↓ -0.26 |
| Total positions | 6 |
